title: Aureline experiment expiry and schema-governance review row
description: Boundary schema for an experiment_review_row record. A review row is the reusable, projection-friendly contract for one control row (experiment, feature flag, rollout, or benchmark mode) that can affect schema-governed surfaces. The record is intended for release packets, docs/help truth, settings explainability, support exports, migration/import/sync previews, and claim publication. Fields are copy-safe: they name ids, versions, paths, and typed consequences without embedding secret-bearing payload values. This schema does not implement runtime evaluation; it freezes the review surface so later tooling can generate and consume the same row without local extensions.

schema_version.description: Integer schema version for experiment review rows. Bumped only on breaking payload changes; additive-optional fields do not bump this version.

reviewable_sentence.description: Short human-readable sentence intended for reviewer surfaces, docs, manifests, or support exports.

path_ref.description: Repo-relative path or document reference. Consumers treat it as opaque text.

owner_dri.description: Owner DRI handle or stable role id (for example @name, ownership role id, or a governed team token).

lifecycle_state.description: Lifecycle state vocabulary for control rows. Adjacent surfaces must not invent parallel marketing synonyms.

kill_switch_source_kind.description: Which source layer can force-disable (or narrow) the row.

consequence_class.description: Consequence-class vocabulary required by the experiment review row contract.

impact_severity.description: Reviewer-facing impact severity. Used for gating and disclosure, not for runtime evaluation.

schema_mismatch_severity.description: Schema-mismatch cue severity. error implies a fail-closed block for any mutation of durable user-owned truth.

preserve_drop_behavior.description: Typed preserve/drop behavior surfaced on schema mismatch or unknown-field handling.

review_date.description: ISO 8601 calendar date (YYYY-MM-DD). Null when the field is intentionally unset.

expiry_window.description: Expiry window for the control row. At least one of review_by or expires_on is set (non-null).

source_ref.description: Path or anchor to the controlling artifact (policy bundle ref, CLI flag entry point, CI workflow, etc.).

fallback_behavior_summary.description: Copy-safe description of what happens when the row is force-disabled or narrowed.

docs_disclosure_ref.description: Optional docs reference that explains the disable/narrowing posture to users or reviewers.

schema_ref.description: Schema reference (repo-relative path or canonical id).

schema_version_observed.description: Observed schema version token from the artifact being read.

field_path.description: Exact field path that triggered the mismatch cue (no values; paths only).

docs_ref.description: Docs link that explains the contract and remediation path.

artifact_type.description: Artifact type whose schema-governance posture this control row can affect.

schema_ref.description: Repo-relative schema reference for the impacted surface.

schema_version_introduced.description: Schema version at which the impacted field paths are introduced (or changed) under this control row.

field_paths.description: Exact field paths added/removed/repurposed under the control row.

default_mismatch_behavior.description: Default preserve/drop behavior when an older/newer reader encounters the impacted fields.

cue_templates.description: Optional copy-safe mismatch cue templates for projections (CLI, support export, import preview).

control_row_id.description: Stable id of the control row (typically prefixed exp., flag., rollout., or bench.).

cohort_or_ring.description: Cohort/ring token for the default rollout scope (review surfaces render it; runtime evaluation is out of scope here).

consequences.description: Declared consequence classes for enabling the control row. Empty array is valid when the row is purely cosmetic and does not alter telemetry, routing, cost posture, write-scope, or retention semantics.

migration_note.description: Copy-safe migration note. Use an explicit 'no migration' note rather than omitting the field.

schema_impacts.description: Schema-governed surfaces whose shape or compatibility posture this control row can affect.

contract_docs_ref.description: Docs reference that defines the expiry and mismatch contract for this review row.

related_register_row_ref.description: Optional reference to the canonical register row (file path plus anchor) this review row projects from.
